name: ip-services
description: Internal must-find fixture for the ip_address asset. Deploy a host exposing known services (e.g. vulhub redis-no-auth, ftp-anon) and point target at it. naabu discovers open ports (the recon surface); nmap does -sV; nuclei runs PER-PORT routed tags. must_find asserts the open-port discovery; service-CVE recall grows as nuclei network templates land.

competitors.note: No neutral network-scan leaderboard (Tenable / Qualys / Rapid7 publish no comparable scorecard). Reference: credentialed-scan recall vs. Nessus. This internal fixture + the anti-overfit grep guard recall against over-tuning to the fixture host.
